message:
test(core): add property-based tests for ingestion parser (ft-2p9cb.3.2.3)

8 proptests: zero-copy ratio bounded, complete line positive, flush nonempty,
reset zeroes, serde roundtrips for ParseResult/IngestChunk/IngestDegradation/
IngestParserConfig. 140 proptests total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
